description.from: Deals 52*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 26.2% of ATK M.DMG 7 times to nearby enemies within a circular area. Then deals 548*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 263.1% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec.
description.to: Deals 46*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 26.2% of ATK M.DMG 7times to nearby enemies within a circular area, then deals 384*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 263.1% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec.

description.from: Deals 255*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 145% of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by 15%. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec, dealing 280*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 159% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies.
description.to: Deals 255*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 145% of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing ATK SPD by 35%. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec, dealing 44*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 27.8% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies.

description.from: Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal 518*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 221.3% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals 828*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 354% of ATK additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by 10%. When Kirze attacks enemies affected by [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. After 5 sec, [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes, dealing 290*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 200% of ATK M.DMG, plus an additional 43% of ATK M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], and resets all [Arcane Crystal Energy] stacks.
description.to:
Summons an Arcane Crystal, dealing 518*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 221.3% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, then causes an explosion that deals 828*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 354% of ATK additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5sec, and when Kirze attacks enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies stacks of [Arcane Crystal Energy].

[Arcane Crystal Curse]: Reduces ATK SPD by 10%, and after 5sec, deals 290*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 200% of ATK M.DMG + 43% of ATK M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], then resets all stacks.

description.from: Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by 150, and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 20%.
description.to: Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by 250, and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 15%.

light.from: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] Increases duration by 4 sec.
light.to: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 but increases duration by 4 sec.

dark.from: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] While active, increases Kirze’s ATK Spd by 40%.
dark.to: Increases ATK SPD by an additional 35%.

description.from: [Slash, Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.
description.to: [Slash, Blade of Judgment! ] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1000.

description.from: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 100.
description.to: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK SPD of all allies by 10% and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by {0}.

description.from: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by 250 and additionally increases CC duration increase effect by {0}%.
description.to: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit DMG by 32%, and changes the CC duration increase effect to {0}%.
